'''âv-th-zh''' ('''kavathazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:negatize|negatize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:negatize|negatize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-th-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kavathazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivathazh|thivathazh]] || [[word:jivathazh|jivathazh]] || [[word:shivathazh|shivathazh]] || [[word:kivathazh|kivathazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvathazh|thuthuvathazh]] || [[word:jujuvathazh|jujuvathazh]] || [[word:shushuvathazh|shushuvathazh]] || [[word:kukuvathazh|kukuvathazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvathazh|thuvathazh]] || [[word:juvathazh|juvathazh]] || [[word:shuvathazh|shuvathazh]] || [[word:kuvathazh|kuvathazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvathazh|thuvathazh]] || [[word:juvathazh|juvathazh]] || [[word:shuvathazh|shuvathazh]] || [[word:kuvathazh|kuvathazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevathazh|thevathazh]] || [[word:jevathazh|jevathazh]] || [[word:shevathazh|shevathazh]] || [[word:kevathazh|kevathazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovathazh|thothovathazh]] || [[word:jojovathazh|jojovathazh]] || [[word:shoshovathazh|shoshovathazh]] || [[word:kokovathazh|kokovathazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovathazh|thovathazh]] || [[word:jovathazh|jovathazh]] || [[word:shovathazh|shovathazh]] || [[word:kovathazh|kovathazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovathazh|thovathazh]] || [[word:jovathazh|jovathazh]] || [[word:shovathazh|shovathazh]] || [[word:kovathazh|kovathazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvathazh|thĂŠvathazh]] || [[word:jĂŠvathazh|jĂŠvathazh]] || [[word:shĂŠvathazh|shĂŠvathazh]] || [[word:kĂŠvathazh|kĂŠvathazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavathazh|thathavathazh]] || [[word:jajavathazh|jajavathazh]] || [[word:shashavathazh|shashavathazh]] || [[word:kakavathazh|kakavathazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavathazh|thavathazh]] || [[word:javathazh|javathazh]] || [[word:shavathazh|shavathazh]] || [[word:kavathazh|kavathazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavathazh|thavathazh]] || [[word:javathazh|javathazh]] || [[word:shavathazh|shavathazh]] || [[word:kavathazh|kavathazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavathazh|shavathazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavathazh|goshavathazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavathazh|gokishavathazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavathazhnĂŒ|shavathazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavathazhnknĂŒ|goshavathazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavathazhnĂŒ|gokishavathazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavathazhshĂ«|shavathazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkshĂ«|goshavathazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavathazhshĂ«|gokishavathazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavathazhro|shavathazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkro|goshavathazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavathazhro|gokishavathazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavathazhmu|shavathazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkmu|goshavathazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavathazhmu|gokishavathazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavathazhsher|shavathazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavathazhnksher|goshavathazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavathazhsher|gokishavathazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavathazhng|shavathazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkng|goshavathazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavathazhng|gokishavathazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavathazhya|shavathazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkya|goshavathazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavathazhya|gokishavathazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavathazhyam|shavathazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkyam|goshavathazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavathazhyam|gokishavathazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavathazhnĂŒshĂ«|shavathazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavathazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavathazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavathazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavathazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavathazhnĂŒro|shavathazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavathazhnknĂŒro|goshavathazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavathazhnĂŒro|gokishavathazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavathazhnĂŒmu|shavathazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavathazhnknĂŒmu|goshavathazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavathazhnĂŒmu|gokishavathazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavathazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shavathazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavathazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavathazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavathazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavathazhshĂ«ro|shavathazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkshĂ«ro|goshavathazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavathazhshĂ«ro|gokishavathazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavathazhshĂ«mu|shavathazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkshĂ«mu|goshavathazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavathazhshĂ«mu|gokishavathazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavathazhronĂŒ|shavathazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkronĂŒ|goshavathazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavathazhronĂŒ|gokishavathazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavathazhroshĂ«|shavathazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkroshĂ«|goshavathazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavathazhroshĂ«|gokishavathazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavathazhromu|shavathazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkromu|goshavathazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavathazhromu|gokishavathazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavathazhmunĂŒ|shavathazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkmunĂŒ|goshavathazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavathazhmunĂŒ|gokishavathazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavathazhmushĂ«|shavathazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkmushĂ«|goshavathazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavathazhmushĂ«|gokishavathazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavathazhmuro|shavathazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavathazhnkmuro|goshavathazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavathazhmuro|gokishavathazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|806ef69}}
